records.ety: [L. internecinus deadly, murderous, fr. internecare to kill, to slaughter; inter between + necare to kill; akin to Gr. <?/ dead. See Necromancy.]

defs: Involving, or accompanied by, mutual slaughter; mutually destructive.
quotes: Internecine quarrels, horrible tumults, stain the streets with blood.

defs: Of or pertaining to internal conflicts within a group; as, internecine quarrels.
